creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 254880
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.118.0

This patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.116.0 to 1.118.0. I've also adjusted the WWW reference thanks to a heads-up from lwhsu@. :)

The port builds fine, passes the testsuite (Ran 3814 tests in 133.204s, PASSED (skips=175, successes=3639)) and has been rather well-behaved while in operation on my server for the past few days.

Feedback is appreciated as always. :)

Kind regards,
Sascha
